results.title: Market Recap: Moderna, Apple, Tesla Moves

segments.vo: Moderna jumped over ten percent today!
segments.text: Moderna jumped over ten percent today!

segments.vo: Moderna climbed over 10% after Jim Cramer expressed confidence, stating he likes having a position in the stock.
segments.caption: Moderna +10% on Cramer boost
segments.name: Moderna

segments.vo: Meanwhile, Tesla shares fell nearly 7.5% after Barclays reiterated a cautious "Equalweight" rating, citing concerns around robotaxi and Optimus developments.
segments.caption: Tesla -7.5% on cautious outlook
segments.name: Tesla

segments.vo: Apple rose almost 5% on plans for a major iPhone lineup expansion between late 2026 and early 2027, including its first foldable iPhone.
segments.caption: Apple +5% on foldable iPhone plans
segments.name: Apple

segments.vo: And Arm Holdings dropped nearly 6.6%, pulling back from recent peaks, despite reports of its robust licensing business driving AI-fueled growth.
segments.caption: Arm -6.6% pulls back from peak
segments.name: Arm Holdings

results.title: Moderna Surges: What's Driving the Biotech Rally?

segments.vo: Moderna surged over 10% today, capping off a remarkable run!
segments.text: Moderna surged over 10% today, capping off a remarkable run!

segments.vo: Moderna, ticker MRNA, climbed more than 10% today, now trading at $79.76 a share, extending a significant rally that began last month.
segments.caption: Moderna Jumps +10.01%
segments.name: Moderna

segments.vo: This recent momentum follows a unanimous 9-0 FDA vote which has helped push the biotech stock up over 70% in just the last month, reigniting investor interest.
segments.caption: FDA Vote Powers MRNA
segments.name: Moderna

segments.vo: This robust performance comes as some Wall Street analysts hold an average price target suggesting the stock could fall by 44% from current levels. However, even Jim Cramer has noted he now likes having a position in Moderna after years of skepticism.
segments.caption: Analysts Diverge on MRNA
segments.name: Moderna

results.title: Market Movers: Moderna Jumps, Tesla Dips

segments.vo: Moderna jumped over 10% today – let's break down the market's biggest moves.
segments.text: Moderna jumped over 10% today – let's break down the market's biggest moves.

segments.vo: Moderna jumped over 10% after Jim Cramer voiced his confidence, with investor sentiment also boosted as oil prices dipped to pre-Iran war levels.
segments.caption: Moderna jumps 10%+
segments.name: Moderna

segments.vo: Meanwhile, Tesla fell almost 7.5% today. This came as Barclays reiterated a cautious Equalweight rating on the stock, citing concerns around its robotaxi and Optimus developments.
segments.caption: Tesla drops on analyst caution
segments.name: Tesla

segments.vo: Apple climbed nearly 5%, driven by news of its plans for a significant expansion of its iPhone lineup, including its first foldable model, anticipated in late 2026.
segments.caption: Apple plans foldable iPhone
segments.name: Apple

segments.vo: And Netflix was up almost 4.7%, following reports highlighting its robust cash-generating business model compared to competitors in the streaming space.
segments.caption: Netflix cash flow strong
segments.name: Netflix
